query: CREATE TABLE `ads` (`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL, `userId` int NOT NULL, `campaignId` int, `metaId` varchar(64) NOT NULL, `campaignMetaId` varchar(64), `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL, `status` varchar(32), `adsetName` varchar(255), `impressions` bigint, `reach` bigint, `clicks` bigint, `spend` float, `ctr` float, `cpc` float, `cpm` float, `roas` float, `conversions` float, `creativeType` varchar(32), `thumbnailUrl` text, `adText` text, `headline` varchar(512), `callToAction` varchar(64), `rawData` json, `syncedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()), `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()), CONSTRAINT `ads_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`))
